negative_prompt_default: blurry, distorted face, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate character, wrong eyes, bad anatomy, low detail, text, watermark
style_rules: same visual style across all pages

pages.prompt_template: children's book cover showing {child_name} entering a magical forest with glowing lanterns and friendly creatures

pages.text_template: Pour {child_name}, que cette aventure te rappelle combien tu es courageux.
{child_name} ouvre la porte du grand bois et entend les arbres lui souhaiter la bienvenue.
pages.prompt_template: storybook illustration of {child_name} stepping into a magical forest path, golden fireflies, gentle wonder

pages.text_template: Un renard lumineux guide {child_name} jusqu'a une clairiere remplie de pierres etoilees.
pages.prompt_template: storybook illustration of {child_name} following a glowing fox in a forest clearing of star stones

pages.text_template: {child_name} decouvre que la clef de la foret apparait quand on ose avancer avec confiance.
pages.prompt_template: storybook illustration of {child_name} discovering a glowing key in a magical forest, brave and centered

pages.text_template: Grace a son coeur vaillant, {child_name} rend a la foret sa lumiere et son calme.
pages.prompt_template: storybook illustration of {child_name} restoring light to an enchanted forest, warm magical ending

pages.text_template: {child_name} repart avec un secret precieux : le courage grandit a chaque pas.

pages.prompt_template: storybook back cover illustration of a peaceful magical forest under twilight, premium elegant composition
